raw_consumer_statement:
My Best buy credit company did not adding my first payment for initial purchase {$780.00} from XX/XX/XXXX to my payment records for two month. this purchase money I suppose to paid off in 18 months with 0 % rate. I did my first payment in advance in 13 days of of {$67.00} on XX/XX/XXXX for XXXX pay period but they didn't reporting this transaction till XXXX pay period statement, XX/XX/XXXX. They combined it with my second payment {$60.00} in XXXX XX/XX/XXXX as one {$120.00} transaction and wrongly classified as one late payment. 
By doing this unlawful payment manipulation they ruined my payment history and announced majority of my payments as being late even all payment done in advance 13-28 days. 
Even I paid in advance in full in 12 month instead of 18 Best buy credit company forcing me to pay extra {$990.00} and threatening my with bad credit history. I am adding my all payments history below.
